# 🚀 Pull Request

Thank you for contributing to **MTG CLI Game**!

Please fill out this checklist to help us review your pull request.

## ✅ Checklist

- [ ] I have tested my changes locally
- [ ] I have run `npm install` if new dependencies were added
- [ ] I updated the README / documentation if needed
- [ ] My code follows the project style and guidelines
- [ ] I have added clear commit messages

## 💬 Description

Please describe the purpose of this pull request:

- What feature, fix, or improvement does it include?
- Why is it needed?

## 📸 Screenshots (if applicable)

_(Include screenshots or CLI output if relevant)_

## 📚 Related Issues

Closes #(issue number) or relates to #(issue number)

---

Thank you for your contribution!
